rules.text: Images MUST be opened in macOS Preview.app — never tell users to check /tmp
Auto-sync after every chat turn via sync-chat-turn hook

facts.text: Neural-Bus provides OpenCodeJetStreamClient, OpenSinAgentRuntime, SUBJECTS, createEventEnvelope for agent messaging via NATS JetStream

decisions.text: Full JetStream implementation merged to main including TypeScript SDK, Python SDK, MCP server, Ouroboros bridge, tests, and docs
decisions.rationale: Complete event-driven communication layer for all A2A agents

solutions.text: TypeScript + Python SDK with durable consumer patterns, request/reply, and event envelopes
Ouroboros bridge with rememberLesson() and registerCapability() for automatic brain updates
